content.thinking:
Let me deploy a 3-node CockroachDB cluster in the cockroachdb namespace using native Kubernetes resources. I need to check the current state first, then create the necessary resources.

Let me start by checking the current state of the namespace and RBAC resources.

content.text: Let me check the current state of the namespace first.

content.text: RBAC is in place. Now I'll create the headless service, public service, StatefulSet, and PodDisruptionBudget.

input.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<'EOF'
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  publishNotReadyAddresses: true
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
  ports:
  - name: grpc
    port: 26257
    targetPort: 26257
  - name: http
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster-public
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
  ports:
  - name: grpc
    port: 26257
    targetPort: 26257
  - name: http
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster-pdb
  namespace: cockroachdb
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: crdb-cluster
  namespace: cockroachdb
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
spec:
  replicas: 3
  serviceName: crdb-cluster
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: crdb-cluster-sa
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - weight: 100
            podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchLabels:
                  app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
                  app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname
      containers:
      - name: cockroachdb
        image: cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.1.0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        ports:
        - name: grpc
          containerPort: 26257
        - name: http
          containerPort: 8080
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -ecx
        - |
          exec /cockroach/cockroach start \
            --insecure \
            --advertise-host=$(hostname -f) \
            --http-addr=0.0.0.0:8080 \
            --listen-addr=0.0.0.0:26257 \
            --join=crdb-cluster-0.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-1.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-2.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257 \
            --cache=25% \
            --max-sql-memory=25% \
            --logtostderr=WARNING
        env:
        - name: COCKROACH_CHANNEL
          value: kubernetes-helm
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: http
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 5
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health?ready=1
            port: http
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 2
        volumeMounts:
        - name: datadir
          mountPath: /cockroach/cockroach-data
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 256Mi
      volumes: []
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - metadata:
      name: datadir
    spec:
      accessModes: [ReadWriteOnce]
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 10Gi
EOF
input.description: Apply headless service, public service, PDB, and StatefulSet for CockroachDB

content.content:
service/crdb-cluster created
service/crdb-cluster-public created
poddisruptionbudget.policy/crdb-cluster-pdb created
statefulset.apps/crdb-cluster created

tool_use_result.stdout:

content.text: Resources created. Now let me wait for the pods to come up and then verify.

input.command:
echo "Waiting for pods to start..."
for i in $(seq 1 24); do
  READY=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb get pods -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cockroachdb --no-headers 2>/dev/null | grep -c "Running" || true)
  TOTAL=$(kubectl -n cockroachdb get pods -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cockroachdb --no-headers 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
  echo "  [${i}] ${READY}/${TOTAL} pods Running"
  if [ "$READY" = "3" ] && [ "$TOTAL" = "3" ]; then
    echo "All 3 pods are Running."
    break
  fi
  sleep 10
done
input.description: Poll until all 3 CockroachDB pods are Running

description: Poll until all 3 CockroachDB pods are Running
